requirements.requirement: Conduct annual comprehensive technology risk assessment covering all capital market systems
requirements.rationale: Systematic identification and management of technology risks

requirements.requirement: Implement pre-trade and post-trade risk controls for algorithmic trading systems including kill switch capability
requirements.rationale: Prevents algorithmic malfunctions from causing market disruption

requirements.requirement: Conduct risk assessments for all critical and significant technology changes before implementation
requirements.rationale: Prevents introduction of technology risks through unassessed changes
